assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive pre-flight checks section with commands to verify current cluster versions, node health (kubectl get nodes), and pod status checks

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)" to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Includes multiple API deprecation checks including kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep deprecated and specific checks for deprecated ingresses.extensions and deployments.extensions

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.29 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Provides the exact command: gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.29

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Includes verification commands after control plane upgrade with expected output indicators (Control plane shows 1.29.x, all system pods Running) and specific commands to check control plane version

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for each node pool upgrade to 1.29
assertions.reason: Provides exact commands for both node pools: gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool and workload-pool with --cluster, --zone, and --cluster-version 1.29 flags

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Includes watch commands like 'watch kubectl get nodes -o wide' and specific monitoring for each node pool with kubectl get nodes -l cloud.google.com/gke-nodepool=POOL_NAME

assertions.expectation: Repeats the full sequence for 1.29→1.30 (sequential, not skipping)
assertions.reason: Phase 3 repeats the complete sequence with control plane upgrade to 1.30 first, followed by both node pool upgrades to 1.30, maintaining sequential approach

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Final validation section includes commands to check node versions, pod health across all namespaces, deployments, services, and kube-system pods status

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Includes comprehensive troubleshooting section with emergency rollback procedures, including creating new node pools at old versions and migrating workloads
